_doc: Stack-agnostic coverage gate config. Read by .codex/precommit_hooks/probe_coverage.py. Empty feature_globs → use built-in defaults baked into probe_coverage.py (generic Python: services / handlers / api / views). Customize for your stack's feature layout; exempt_globs to opt out infra/tests/3rd-party.
_note: Empty feature_globs = scope-everything-not-exempted via probe_coverage.py defaults. Add stack-specific patterns (e.g. Odoo: '**/addons/**/{models,controllers,jobs,wizards}/**.py') to limit scope.
